details.errorMessage: `PRO` isn't allowed here. Please check the autocomplete suggestions before the error for alternative options.
details.queryString: fetch dt.entity.service | fields tags | filter arrayContains(tags, concat("ENVIRONMENT:", ""PRO"")) | expand tags | filter startsWith(tags, "APP:") | fieldsAdd app = replaceString(tags, "APP:", "") | filter isNotNull(app) and app != "" | summarize count(), by: { app } | fields value = app | sort value asc | append [ data record(value = "ALL") ]

details.errorMessage: `PRO` isn't allowed here. Please check the autocomplete suggestions before the error for alternative options.
details.queryString: fetch dt.entity.service | fields id, entity.name, tags | filter arrayContains(tags, concat("ENVIRONMENT:", ""PRO"")) | filter ""ALL"" == "ALL" or arrayContains(tags, concat("APP:", ""ALL"")) | fields value = toString(id), service_name = entity.name | dedup value | sort service_name asc | append [ data record(value = "ALL", service_name = "ALL") ]
